prompt:
Use case: sketch-to-render
Asset type: runtime tactics unit sprite
Primary request: turn this Time Travelers concept into a clean runtime battle sprite for the Aion Trooper
Subject: the same time-traveler frontline rifleman with a sealed helmet, broad segmented armor, expedition pouches, and a heavy rifle
Style/medium: moody post-apocalyptic tactics sprite illustration, painterly pixel-art-inspired, readable at small scale
Composition/framing: single full-body subject, centered, facing slightly left, grounded stance, transparent background, tight sprite bounds
Lighting/mood: cold overcast wasteland light with restrained contrast
Color palette: weathered steel, oxidized teal, faded hazard orange, cold reactor white
Constraints: preserve the concept silhouette, preserve the helmet and rifle language, derive directly from the provided concept art, rendered around 106px tall in game, large readable shapes, simplified fine detail, no floor, no scenery, no text
Avoid: extra characters, extra props, glow spam, photorealism, anime gloss, cinematic background
